MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Order For Undertaking
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Henning III, of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, for plaintiffs;
Jeanette N. Little, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendants, Christine Curtis and George Wayne Curtis, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CHRISTINE CURTIS, AND G. WAY CURTIS' Motion And Order For Undertaking is denied. Defendant does not sufficiently demonstrate a reasonable possibility of prevailing. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
